response:
VERDICT: TAMPERED
ROUND: 0
REASONING: Taking the very first round:  
• e (line L0069) = 0x5BE0CD19,  
• S1 (line L0070)   = 0x3587272B.  
Adding them (mod 2³²) must give  
0x5BE0CD19 + 0x3587272B = 0x9147F444.  

Step1 reported in the trace (line L0072) is  
1001 0001 0110 0111 1111 0100 0100 0100 → 0x9167F444.  

0x9167F444 differs from the correct 0x9147F444 by 0x00200000 (a single-bit  flip in bit 21).  
Everything earlier (e, S1) is correct, so the first faulty value is step1; all subsequent values are therefore propagated from this error. Hence the single-bit tamper occurred in round 0.
